email_text:
Hi,
I am wondering if you could schedule a one-hour meeting with me on March 9th, 2026.
I am generally available from 14:00 to 17:00 GMT.

Let me know if any time works for you!

Best regards,
John Smith

Good morning,
I'm reaching out to schedule a 2-hour project review meeting sometime on March 9th, 2026.
I can meet anytime between 1:00 PM and 6:00 PM.

Thank you,
Robert Wilson

Hello,

Would you be available for a 45-minute interview on March 9th, 2026?
I prefer morning slots between 9:00am and 12:00pm.

Best,
Amanda Lee
